decent.def: 體面的、正派的、像樣地 (體)
decent.col: decent job, decent meal, decent person
decent.ex: He is a very decent and honest person.

decently.ex: He behaved very decently at the_party.

decentralize/decentralise.ex: We need to decentralize power online.

decentralization.def: 分散、地方分權人物 (單數) (散)

deception.ex: The_whole plan was an act of deception.

decide.def: 決定、斷定、下決心的人的人
decide.col: decide for, decide on, decide against
decide.ex: I can't decide which book to buy now.

decided.def: 明確的、果斷的人的人 (或物) (果)
decided.ex: He has a decided advantage over me.

decidedly.ex: It's decidedly cold in the_old room.

decider.def: 決賽、決定者人物 (單數) (決)

deciding.def: 決定性的、起關鍵作用的人 (或物) (決)
deciding.ex: Cost was the_deciding factor for us.

deciduous.def: 脫落性的、落葉的的人的人物 (落)
deciduous.ex: Oak is a common local deciduous tree.

decigram.def: 分克 (十分之一克)人物 (單數) (分)

decilitre/deciliter.def: 分升 (十分之一升)人物 (單數) (升)
decilitre/deciliter.ex: Add one decilitre of water to the_mix.

decimal.def: 十進位的、小數的人的人物 (單數) (小)
decimal.ex: Put the_decimal point in the_right place.

decimate.def: 成批殺死、大量削减的人的人

decimation.def: 大量削減、大批殺死人物 (單數) (削)

decimetre/decimeter.def: 分米 (十分之一米)人物 (單數) (米)
decimetre/decimeter.ex: The_box was exactly one decimetre high.

decipher.ex: I can't decipher your messy writing.

decipherable.def: 可辨認的人的人物 (單數) (辨)
decipherable.ex: The_old code is not easily decipherable.

decision.def: 決定、果決、裁決人物 (單數) (決)
decision.col: make a decision, final decision, take a decision
decision.ex: I've made a final decision to go now.

decisive.ex: She played a decisive role in match.

decisiveness.def: 果斷、決斷力人物 (單數) (決)

deck.def: 甲板、層、裝飾、打倒的人的人人物 (單數) (甲/飾)
deck.col: on deck, deck out (打扮), hit the_deck
deck.ex: They were walking on the_upper deck.

deck-chair.def: 摺疊帆布躺椅人物 (單數) (椅)
deck-chair.ex: He sat on a wooden deck-chair to rest.

decking.def: 鋪甲板材料、裝飾的人 (或物) (板)
decking.ex: We used timber decking for the_yard.

declaim.def: 慷慨慷慨陳詞、大聲地的人的人
declaim.ex: He began to declaim against the_war.

declamation.def: 慷慨陳詞、演說人物 (單數) (陳)

declamatory.def: 演說的、慷慨慷慨得的人的人物 (單數) (演)

declaration.def: 宣言、宣布、申報人物 (單數) (言)
declaration.ex: He made a declaration of love today.

declarative.def: 說明的、陳述的人的人物 (與)
declarative.ex: The_answer is in a declarative form.

declaratory.def: 宣言的、說明的高地的人人物 (單數) (宣)

declare.def: 宣布、聲稱、申報的人的人
declare.ex: Do you have anything to declare now?

declared.def: 公然的、宣布的人的人 (或物) (公)
declared.ex: He is my declared enemy in the_case.

declassify.def: 撤銷保密、公開的人的人
declassify.ex: They need to declassify the_files now.

declination.def: 衰微、偏角、下傾人物 (單數) (衰)

decline.def: 下降、凋謝、婉拒、傾斜的人的人人物 (單數) (降/謝)
decline.col: on the_decline, decline offer, steep decline
decline.ex: I must decline your kind offer today.

declining.def: 下降的、衰退的人 (或物) (衰)
declining.ex: We face a declining birthrate tonight.

decoct.ex: She began to decoct herbs for tea.

decoction.def: 煎劑、熬出的汁液人物 (單數) (液)

decode.ex: We must try to decode the_radio signal.

decoder.def: 解碼器、譯碼員人物 (單數) (器)

decollate.ex: He tried to decollate the_old book.

decolletage.def: 低領、露頸肩的服裝人物 (單數) (領)
decolletage.ex: She wore a dress with deep decolletage.

decollete.def: 低領的、露頸肩的人的人物 (領)
decollete.ex: A decollete dress is fit for the_ball.

decolonize/decolonise.def: 使非殖民化、給予獨立的人的人

decompose.def: 分解、腐爛、使腐爛的人的人

decompress.ex: You need to decompress the_zip file.

decongestant.def: 解充血藥、去鼻塞劑人物 (單數) (藥)
decongestant.ex: He used a nasal decongestant for cold.

decontaminate.def: 淨化、除去毒物的人的人

decontrol.def: 解除控制的人的人人物 (單數) (放)
decontrol.ex: They want to decontrol local prices.

decor/decor.def: 裝飾、室內佈置人物 (單數) (飾)
decor/decor.ex: The_hotel has a very modern decor.
